---
title: "Main Effects and Interaction Analyses: ANCOVA"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, include = TRUE,  warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

Purrble_Long_Master <- read_csv("Purrble_Long_Master.csv")
View(Purrble_Long_Master)

Purrble_Master_Wide <- read_csv("Purrble_Master_Wide.csv")
View(Purrble_Master_Wide)

Purrble_Master_Wide <- Purrble_Master_Wide %>%
  mutate(
    condition = factor(condition_num, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Waitlist", "Purrble")),
    gender_id = factor(identity_group, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Cisgender", "TGD"))
  )

```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(broom)
library(car)
library(effectsize)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)

options(contrasts = c("contr.sum", "contr.poly"))

outcome_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~section,                ~outcome,           ~pre_var,
  "Emotion Regulation",    "Post_DERS8_Sum",   "Pre_DERS8_Sum",
  "Depression",            "Post_PHQ9_Sum",    "Pre_PHQ9_Sum",
  "Anxiety",               "Post_GAD7_Sum",    "Pre_GAD7_Sum"
)

make_coef_table <- function(outcome, pre_var, section, data) {
  
  mod <- lm(
    reformulate(c("condition_num", pre_var, "identity_group", "age"), outcome),
    data = data
  )
  
  coef_tbl <- broom::tidy(mod, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Predictor = dplyr::case_when(
        term == "(Intercept)" ~ "(Intercept)",
        term == "condition_num" ~ "Condition",
        term == pre_var ~ dplyr::case_when(
          pre_var == "Pre_DERS8_Sum" ~ "Baseline Emotion Regulation",
          pre_var == "Pre_PHQ9_Sum"  ~ "Baseline Depression",
          pre_var == "Pre_GAD7_Sum"  ~ "Baseline Anxiety",
          TRUE ~ pre_var
        ),
        term == "identity_group" ~ "Gender Identity",
        term == "age" ~ "Age",
        TRUE ~ term
      ),
      beta_fmt = sprintf("%.2f", estimate),
      sig = dplyr::case_when(
        p.value < .001 ~ "***",
        p.value < .01 ~ "**",
        p.value < .05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      beta_display = paste0(beta_fmt, sig),
      p_display = dplyr::case_when(
        p.value < .001 ~ "<.001",
        TRUE ~ formatC(p.value, format = "f", digits = 2)
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      Predictor,
      beta_display,
      conf.low,
      conf.high,
      std.error,
      statistic,
      p_display
    )
  
  eta_tbl <- effectsize::eta_squared(mod, partial = TRUE, ci = 0.95) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Predictor = dplyr::case_when(
        Parameter == "condition_num" ~ "Condition",
        Parameter == pre_var ~ dplyr::case_when(
          pre_var == "Pre_DERS8_Sum" ~ "Baseline Emotion Regulation",
          pre_var == "Pre_PHQ9_Sum"  ~ "Baseline Depression",
          pre_var == "Pre_GAD7_Sum"  ~ "Baseline Anxiety",
          TRUE ~ pre_var
        ),
        Parameter == "identity_group" ~ "Gender Identity",
        Parameter == "age" ~ "Age",
        TRUE ~ Parameter
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(Predictor, Eta2_partial, CI_low, CI_high)
  
  coef_tbl %>%
    dplyr::left_join(eta_tbl, by = "Predictor") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Section = section,
      `β` = beta_display,
      LL = round(conf.low, 2),
      UL = round(conf.high, 2),
      SE = round(std.error, 2),
      t = round(statistic, 2),
      p = p_display,
      `Partial η²` = dplyr::if_else(is.na(Eta2_partial), "—", sprintf("%.2f", Eta2_partial)),
      `η² LL` = dplyr::if_else(is.na(CI_low), "—", sprintf("%.2f", CI_low)),
      `η² UL` = dplyr::if_else(is.na(CI_high), "—", sprintf("%.2f", CI_high))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      Section, Predictor, `β`, LL, UL, SE, t, p, `Partial η²`, `η² LL`, `η² UL`
    )
}

table3_df <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  outcome_map,
  ~ make_coef_table(..2, ..3, ..1, Purrble_Master_Wide)
)

make_section_row <- function(label) {
  tibble::tibble(
    Section = label,
    Predictor = NA_character_,
    `β` = NA_character_,
    LL = NA_real_,
    UL = NA_real_,
    SE = NA_real_,
    t = NA_real_,
    p = NA_character_,
    `Partial η²` = NA_character_,
    `η² LL` = NA_character_,
    `η² UL` = NA_character_
  )
}

table3_display <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  make_section_row("Emotion Regulation"),
  table3_df %>% dplyr::filter(Section == "Emotion Regulation") %>% dplyr::mutate(Section = NA_character_),
  
  make_section_row("Depression"),
  table3_df %>% dplyr::filter(Section == "Depression") %>% dplyr::mutate(Section = NA_character_),
  
  make_section_row("Anxiety"),
  table3_df %>% dplyr::filter(Section == "Anxiety") %>% dplyr::mutate(Section = NA_character_)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Predictor = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(Section), Section, Predictor),
    LL = ifelse(is.na(LL), "", sprintf("%.2f", LL)),
    UL = ifelse(is.na(UL), "", sprintf("%.2f", UL)),
    SE = ifelse(is.na(SE), "", sprintf("%.2f", SE)),
    t = ifelse(is.na(t), "", sprintf("%.2f", t))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Section)

knitr::kable(
  table3_display,
  caption = "Table 3. Purrble Effects on Emotion Regulation, Depression, and Anxiety",
  col.names = c("Predictor", "β", "LL", "UL", "SE", "t", "p", "Partial η²", "LL", "UL"),
  align = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c"),
  format = "markdown",
  escape = FALSE
) %>%
  kableExtra::add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "95% CI" = 2, " " = 3, " " = 1, "95% CI" = 2)) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(broom)
library(car)
library(effectsize)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)

options(contrasts = c("contr.sum", "contr.poly"))

outcome_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~section,                          ~outcome,                     ~pre_var,
  "Hope Pathways",                   "Post_SHS_Pathways",          "Pre_SHS_Pathways",
  "Hope Agency",                     "Post_SHS_Agency",            "Pre_SHS_Agency",
  "Total Hope",                      "Post_SHS_TotalHope",         "Pre_SHS_TotalHope",
  "Loneliness (UCLA Total)",         "Post_ucla_Sum",              "Pre_ucla_Sum",
  "PMERQ Focus",                     "Post_pmerq_Focus_Avg",       "Pre_pmerq_Focus_Avg",
  "PMERQ Distract",                  "Post_pmerq_Distract_Avg",    "Pre_pmerq_Distract_Avg",
  "PMERQ Attentional Deployment",    "Post_pmerq_AD_Avg",          "Pre_pmerq_AD_Avg"
)

make_coef_table <- function(outcome, pre_var, section, data) {
  
  mod <- lm(
    reformulate(c("condition_num", pre_var, "identity_group", "age"), outcome),
    data = data
  )
  
  coef_tbl <- broom::tidy(mod, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Predictor = dplyr::case_when(
        term == "(Intercept)" ~ "(Intercept)",
        term == "condition_num" ~ "Condition",
        term == pre_var ~ paste("Baseline", section),
        grepl("^identity_group", term) ~ "Gender Identity",
        term == "age" ~ "Age",
        TRUE ~ term
      ),
      beta_fmt = sprintf("%.2f", estimate),
      sig = dplyr::case_when(
        p.value < .001 ~ "***",
        p.value < .01 ~ "**",
        p.value < .05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      beta_display = paste0(beta_fmt, sig),
      p_display = dplyr::case_when(
        p.value < .001 ~ "<.001",
        TRUE ~ formatC(p.value, format = "f", digits = 2)
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      Predictor,
      beta_display,
      conf.low,
      conf.high,
      std.error,
      statistic,
      p_display
    )
  
  eta_tbl <- effectsize::eta_squared(mod, partial = TRUE, ci = 0.95) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Predictor = dplyr::case_when(
        Parameter == "condition_num" ~ "Condition",
        Parameter == pre_var ~ paste("Baseline", section),
        grepl("^identity_group", Parameter) ~ "Gender Identity",
        Parameter == "age" ~ "Age",
        TRUE ~ Parameter
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(Predictor, Eta2_partial, CI_low, CI_high)
  
  coef_tbl %>%
    dplyr::left_join(eta_tbl, by = "Predictor") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Section = section,
      `β` = beta_display,
      LL = round(conf.low, 2),
      UL = round(conf.high, 2),
      SE = round(std.error, 2),
      t = round(statistic, 2),
      p = p_display,
      `Partial η²` = dplyr::if_else(is.na(Eta2_partial), "—", sprintf("%.2f", Eta2_partial)),
      `η² LL` = dplyr::if_else(is.na(CI_low), "—", sprintf("%.2f", CI_low)),
      `η² UL` = dplyr::if_else(is.na(CI_high), "—", sprintf("%.2f", CI_high))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      Section, Predictor, `β`, LL, UL, SE, t, p, `Partial η²`, `η² LL`, `η² UL`
    )
}

supp_table_df <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  outcome_map,
  ~ make_coef_table(..2, ..3, ..1, Purrble_Master_Wide)
)

make_section_row <- function(label) {
  tibble::tibble(
    Section = label,
    Predictor = NA_character_,
    `β` = NA_character_,
    LL = NA_real_,
    UL = NA_real_,
    SE = NA_real_,
    t = NA_real_,
    p = NA_character_,
    `Partial η²` = NA_character_,
    `η² LL` = NA_character_,
    `η² UL` = NA_character_
  )
}

supp_table_display <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  make_section_row("Hope Pathways"),
  supp_table_df %>% dplyr::filter(Section == "Hope Pathways") %>% dplyr::mutate(Section = NA_character_),
  
  make_section_row("Hope Agency"),
  supp_table_df %>% dplyr::filter(Section == "Hope Agency") %>% dplyr::mutate(Section = NA_character_),
  
  make_section_row("Total Hope"),
  supp_table_df %>% dplyr::filter(Section == "Total Hope") %>% dplyr::mutate(Section = NA_character_),
  
  make_section_row("Loneliness (UCLA Total)"),
  supp_table_df %>% dplyr::filter(Section == "Loneliness (UCLA Total)") %>% dplyr::mutate(Section = NA_character_),
  
  make_section_row("PMERQ Focus"),
  supp_table_df %>% dplyr::filter(Section == "PMERQ Focus") %>% dplyr::mutate(Section = NA_character_),
  
  make_section_row("PMERQ Distract"),
  supp_table_df %>% dplyr::filter(Section == "PMERQ Distract") %>% dplyr::mutate(Section = NA_character_),
  
  make_section_row("PMERQ Attentional Deployment"),
  supp_table_df %>% dplyr::filter(Section == "PMERQ Attentional Deployment") %>% dplyr::mutate(Section = NA_character_)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Predictor = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(Section), Section, Predictor),
    LL = ifelse(is.na(LL), "", sprintf("%.2f", LL)),
    UL = ifelse(is.na(UL), "", sprintf("%.2f", UL)),
    SE = ifelse(is.na(SE), "", sprintf("%.2f", SE)),
    t = ifelse(is.na(t), "", sprintf("%.2f", t))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Section)

knitr::kable(
  supp_table_display,
  caption = "Supplementary Table X. Purrble Effects on Hope, Loneliness, and PMERQ Outcomes",
  col.names = c("Predictor", "β", "LL", "UL", "SE", "t", "p", "Partial η²", "LL", "UL"),
  align = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c"),
  format = "markdown",
  escape = FALSE
) %>%
  kableExtra::add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "95% CI" = 2, " " = 3, " " = 1, "95% CI" = 2)) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```
